infos.name: Office ''''
greetings: '''z'ݭn''U'ɡA'u'n'''@'U Office '''ϧY'i'C

infos.name: Logo Office
infos.description: P'i poskytov'n' n'pov'dy je Logo Office velice klidn'. Nebude proto rozptylovat va'i soust'ed'nost na pr'ci.
greetings: Klepn'te na Logo Office kdykoliv budete pot'ebovat poradit.

infos.name: Office-logoet
infos.description: Office-logoet giver dig hj'lp uden andre effekter end de farvede elementer, der drejer rundt. Det vil ikke forstyrre dig i dit arbejde.
greetings: Klik p' Office-logoet, n'r du har brug for hj'lp.

infos.name: Office Logo
infos.description: Das Office-Logo mit seinen sich drehenden, farbigen Puzzleteilen begleitet Sie durch Ihre t'glichen Aufgaben, ohne Sie von Ihrer Arbeit abzulenken.
greetings: Wenn Sie Hilfe brauchen, klicken Sie auf das Office-Logo.

infos.name: Office Logo
infos.description: The Office Logo gives you help accompanied by a simple spin of its colored pieces.
greetings: Click the Office Logo whenever you need help.

infos.name: Office-logo
infos.description: V'rik's Office-logo auttaa sovittamaan palaset yhteen.
greetings: Kun tarvitset ohjeita, napsauta Office-logoa.

infos.name: Logo Office
infos.description: Le logo Office n'a pas beaucoup de personnalit', mais il sera un compagnon id'al si vous ne voulez pas 'tre perturb' pendant votre travail.
greetings: ' chaque fois que vous avez besoin d'aide, cliquez sur le Logo Office.'

infos.name: Office Embl'ma
infos.description: Office Embl'ma - a megfontolt 's komoly d'nt'shoz'k seg't't'rsa.
greetings: Kattintson az Office Embl'm'ra, ha seg'ts'gre van sz'ks'ge.

infos.name: Logo Office animato
infos.description: Il logo Office animato vi aiuter' mentre gira su se stesso.
greetings: Fare clic sul logo Office animato ogni volta che si desidera il suo aiuto.

infos.name: Office Logo
infos.description: Het Office Logo helpt u met een eenvoudige draai van zijn gekleurde puzzelstukjes. Het leidt u niet af terwijl u orde op zaken stelt.
greetings: Klik op Office Logo als u hulp nodig hebt.

infos.name: Office-logo
infos.description: Den fargesprakende Office-logoen spinner rundt og hjelper deg, men den forstyrrer deg ikke i arbeidet.
greetings: Klikk Office-logoen n'r du trenger hjelp.

infos.name: Logo Office
infos.description: Logo Office wesprze Ci' w kalejdoskopie swych barwnych element'w. Nie przeszkodzi Ci to w skutecznej pracy.
greetings: Kliknij logo Office zawsze, kiedy b'dziesz potrzebowa' pomocy.

infos.name: Office Logo
infos.description: Mesmo brincando com as suas cores, o Office Logo oferece ajuda sem distra'-lo.
greetings: Sempre que precisar, clique no Office Logo.

infos.name: Sigla Office
infos.description: Sigla Office v' ofer' ajutor 'mpreun' cu o simpl' rotire a pieselor ei colorate.
greetings: Face'i clic pe sigla Office ori de c'te ori ave'i nevoie de ajutor.

infos.name: Office Logo
infos.description: Office Logo poma'e vam uz pratnju jednostavne vrtnje svojih obojenih dijelova.
greetings: Pritisnite Office Logo kad god vam zatreba pomo'.

infos.name: Logo Office
infos.description: Logo Office v'm pom''e jednoduch'm oto'en'm svojich farebn'ch 'ast' a nebude odv'dza' va'u pozornos' od pr'ce.
greetings: Kliknite na logo Office v'dy ke' budete potrebova' poradi'.

infos.name: Office-logon
infos.description: Office-logon ger dig hj'lp, ackompanjerad av en stilla piruett.
greetings: Klicka p' Office-logon n'r du beh'ver hj'lp.

infos.name: Office Logo
infos.description: Office Logo, renkli par'alar'n' '''ldatarak size yard'm eder.
greetings: Yard'ma gerek duydu'unuzda Office Logo'yu t'klat'n.

infos.name: Officeov logotip
infos.description: Pomo' Officeovega logotipa spremlja vrtenje njegovih delov.
greetings: Ko potrebujete pomo', kliknite Officeov logotip.

infos.name: Office Logo
infos.description: Bere kolorezko piezek buelta ematearekin batera, Office Logo-k laguntza ematen dizu.
greetings: Klik egin Office Logo-n laguntza behar duzun guztietan.

infos.name: Log'tipo do Office
infos.description: O Log'tipo do Office fornece ajuda acompanhada de uma simples rota''o das suas pe'as coloridas.
greetings: Fa'a clique sobre o Log'tipo do Office para obter ajuda.

infos.name: Logotipo de Office
infos.description: El Logotipo de Office le ayudar' al tiempo que gira sus piezas de colores.
greetings: Haga clic en el logotipo de Office cuando necesite ayuda.
